paragraphs.title: Barcos por Destino
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Barcos organizados por puerto de destino
import org.apache.spark.sql.functions._

val ships = spark.table("logistica.stg_ships")

val byDest = ships.groupBy("dest_port").agg(
  count("*").alias("total_ships"),
  avg("speed_kn").alias("avg_speed"),
  avg("lat").alias("avg_lat"),
  avg("lon").alias("avg_lon")
)
byDest.show()

paragraphs.title: Rutas Disponibles
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Dimensión de rutas
val routes = spark.table("logistica.dim_routes")
routes.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Puertos
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Catálogo de puertos
val ports = spark.table("logistica.dim_ports")
ports.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Tiempos de Transito
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Tiempos de tránsito por ruta
val routes = spark.table("logistica.dim_routes")
routes.select("route_id", "origin_port", "dest_port", "transit_hours", "transit_days", "cost_eur").show()
